title: viola × stuartii
intro: Viola × stuartii, also known as the hybrid pansy, is a hybrid species of flowering plant that is a cross between Viola riviniana and Viola lactea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Viola × stuartii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to exhibit antioxidant and antiviral activity. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions, including skin irritations and digestive issues.
